title: Jewelry (RPG Series)
description: 💍 Find precious gems deep down, and craft them into powerful jewelry!

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sNJAIjUm/images/5fc94a47c06617bd6a646be97241b287ecd3406e.png "")

## 💎 Find precious gems deep down, and craft them into powerful jewelry!

[![Modloader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Fabric%20|%20NeoForge-ecebe6?labelColor=263768&style=for-the-badge)](https://fabricmc.net/)
[![SpellEngine](https://img.shields.io/badge/Ecosystem-Spell_Engine-orange?style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-engine)
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/973561601519149057.svg?label=&logo=discord&logoColor=ffffff&color=7389D8&labelColor=6A7EC2&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/KN9b3pjFTM)

### ✨ Discover more of the RPG Series

[![Skill Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XIpMGI6r/images/3bc519f14fb3e8496f730e7fae961c0481c7368d.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/skill-tree "Skill Tree")

# 📦 Installation

### Required

- [Spell Power Attributes](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-power "")
- [Ranged Weapon API](https://modrinth.com/mod/ranged-weapon-api "")

One slot mod
- on Fabric: [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets) or [Accessories](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories) (not both!)
- on NeoForge: [Accessories](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories)


# 💍 Features

Collect a total of 25+ new, different pieces of jewelry items!

Each piece of jewelry grants different combat related bonus.
 
From early-game to end-game materials, there is always a relevant piece to obtain.

### Trade with Jewelers in villages

Jeweler villagers sell low to middle tier pieces.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sNJAIjUm/images/ea20b8984cf5bd5f8e036a9582b88239f357681b.jpeg "")

### Mine precious gems deep down

Gem Veins are located at the same depths as Diamond Ores, but are half as common.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sNJAIjUm/images/80fd276fb72c6e08f64912ea8afb06a424d6ae92.jpeg "")

### Craft the gems into powerful jewelry

Craft rings and necklaces by combining gems with Gold and Netherite.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sNJAIjUm/images/5501edcaae21ed453fa1052e71585986dbe97356.jpeg "")

### Find jewelry in dungeon chests

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sNJAIjUm/images/37914a769b470f57ca7043364c477e63c0d5af2f.jpeg "")

Find unique (rare) pieces in end-game loot chests (such as: End City treasure, Ancient City treasure...)

# 🔧 Configuration

Various aspects of the mod can be changed, by editing the relevant json files in `minecraft-instance/config/jewelry` folder:
- `world_gen` village structure occurence
- `items` bonus attributes for each item individually
- `loot` which loot tables jewelry items should be added to
